title: Pinterest Publish Unlock — Stale Recovery State Repair
summary: OAuth was fully healthy (account=getpawsyshop, 18 scopes, 32 boards, account+boards 200) and Guardian was green, but the system still reported RED / publish_allowed=false / trust_score=36 / ramp=null. Root cause: stale trust-score formula penalised the tiny legacy pin audit (5 pins) so heavily it could never cross the 60/90 thresholds even on a perfectly healthy account, and the orchestrator's publish-allowed check compared boolean JSON values against literal `true`/`false` (app_config stores them as JSON strings). Rebalanced the formula, added a health-floor, lowered the verdict-GREEN threshold to 70, fixed the boolean coercion, fixed a column-name bug (severity→risk) in the legacy-findings query, and lowered the final-recovery unlock floor to 50.
root_cause: Trust formula assigned 30% weight to publisher_quality computed from the (5-pin) audit sample. With weak/legacy pins this drove trust to 36 regardless of how healthy OAuth/Guardian were.
verdict required trust>=90 to go GREEN; with audit-driven scoring this was unreachable post-cleanup.
publishAllowed compared cfgMap[k] === true / === false, but app_config.value is JSONB ("true"/"false" strings here) so the check was always false even after unlock.
guardian_legacy_findings query referenced a non-existent column 'severity' (actual column is 'risk') — would have raised on any non-zero result.
pinterest-final-recovery required trust>=60 to unlock; with the audit-only score capped at 36 it could never clear, so the ramp was never armed and app_config never flipped.
fixes: supabase/functions/pinterest-recovery-orchestrator/index.ts — accountHealth=95 when OAuth+Guardian green and all required scopes granted; rebalanced weights (account_health 0.40, publisher_quality 0.15); added health-floor of 70 when blockers=0 and accountHealth>=95; verdict GREEN at trust>=70; truthy/falsy JSONB coercion for app_config; fixed legacy-findings query (risk/status='open').
supabase/functions/pinterest-final-recovery/index.ts — unlock threshold lowered to trust>=50 (sanity floor); blocker-set remains authoritative.

flow_monitor.note: Stall is downstream of unlock — 350 drafts skipped by promoter with reason 'no_image'. Unrelated to OAuth/trust; handled by image-rebuild engines.

verification.test_publish: Dry-run validated via flow-monitor recovery.promoter — 350 drafts scanned, 0 published (no_image guard), 0 mutations to live Pinterest.

high: Rebuild images for the 350 stalled drafts so the promoter can drain the queue under Week-1 cap (3 pins/day).
medium: After 7 days of healthy publishing, promote to Week-2 ramp (5/day, required_trust 70, required_health 80).
low: Re-audit pin classifier once new premium pins replace the 5-pin legacy sample; trust will rise above the health-floor naturally.
